decisions.rationale: layout_notes cite ai_RNbBHYLA responsive column-state, but PATHS-02 ui_refs name ai_RNbBHYHn (grid RG) not ai_RNbBHYLA; implementation mounts data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHYHn with grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 achieving equivalent 1→2 column responsive behavior. No criteria_audit, functional_audit, or ui_evidence failure; PATHS-03 depends_on needs grid cells and view-details wiring only. Optional ai_RNbBHYLA marker and Bubble column-state hook are pixel-parity polish, not AC blockers.

Tier-filter no-match copy is intentional React-only client-side UX — IR has no distinct filtered-empty element; bTJEI (style_ref Text_body_) covers zero-enrollment empty state per AC-2/FV-4 and passes ui_evidence. Bubble tier filtering is server/RG-driven without a separate "no matches" label; adding a synthetic bubble-id would invent IR not present in decompose ui_refs.

summary: 0 fix_now, 1 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — post-rewrite review ok=true, coverage 100%, rewrite_pass true, 0 blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. C-1 deferred: ai_RNbBHYLA column-state marker optional polish; responsive grid behavior satisfied via ai_RNbBHYHn Tailwind breakpoints. C-2 accepted: tier-filter empty message is React-only UX with no IR bubble-id source; bTJEI zero-enrollment case is IR-grounded.
